title: The Opposite Sex and How to Live with Them
original_title: The Opposite Sex and How to Live with Them
overview: David seriously fancies smart, rich Carrie as soon as he first offends her in a Boston bar. They run into each other again and though she still finds him appalling, David manages to change her mind.
